This bar is famous for a good reason!  Spectacular views, great drinks and an attentive staff.  We were staying at the Mark Hopkins, so we visited the Top of The Mark 3 times!  We also ate a couple of appetizers, which were large and delicious.  We were never there for live music, as we always came in the early evening.

We stayed at the Mark Hopkins Intercontinental and went to Top of the Mark four days in a row. The staff knew us by name and tried to make it a memorable experience, especially Ulysses. We tried the shrimp tacos (pictured) asparagus flatbread (pictured), short rib sliders, and desserts. Everything was delicious, but expect to pay a premium price. If you get the "top of the mark package" while staying at the hotel, you get a free drink every night, which is a huge bonus. The views are spectacular!

Top of the Mark is one of the most famous rooftop bars in San Francisco. Sitting high above Nob Hill, the views stretch across the entire city and out to the bay.

Watching the sunset from here while enjoying a cocktail is one of those classic San Francisco experiences.

A few of us from The Green Cross staff have recommended this spot to visiting friends many times.
